mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, target, channel, purpose, code, expires_at, used_at, attempt_count, max_attempts, status, created_at FROM verification_codes WHERE target = #{email} AND purpose = 'LOGIN' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, target, channel, purpose, code, expires_at, used_at, attempt_count, max_attempts, status, created_at FROM verification_codes WHERE target = #{email} AND purpose = 'LOGIN' AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE verification_codes SET attempt_count = attempt_count + 1, status = CASE WHEN attempt_count + 1 >= max_attempts THEN 'LOCKED' ELSE status END WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
